goal: 把 dogfood 暴露的 stop-line 术语边界收进 skill

summary.title: 收敛 dogfood 暴露的 stop-line 术语边界
summary.what: 把 dogfood 反馈从零散补丁收敛成 skill 的术语和协议边界：在 Mainline skill 前部新增 Stop-Line Quick Matrix 和 Vocabulary guardrails；把 mainline publish 明确为 Mainline metadata publish，不等于产品发布、release 或 deploy；把 overlap/check 规则收敛为 file overlap -> inspect -> classify，只有 real and potentially contradictory overlap 才进入 mainline check；PR section 增加 gh pr create --body-file 正例并再次禁止 --fill/default body；README/reference 补充 review autonomy 不授权 push main/merge/release，以及 skills add fallback；AGENTS managed template 升级到 v25，stub 升级到 v14。
summary.why: 子代理 dogfood 证明 stop-line 核心模型可用，但也暴露出术语混淆和协议边界不够前置：中文“发布”和 mainline publish 容易混，文件 overlap 容易被误读成必须 check，PR marker 协议可能被 --fill/default body 破坏，中文触发词和 quick matrix 也应该更靠前。把这些收进 skill 的小型设计层，比在各处散落补句子更稳。
summary.user_goal: 把 dogfood 暴露的 stop-line 术语边界收进 skill

decisions.chose: 新增 Stop-Line Quick Matrix 和 Vocabulary guardrails，而不是只在原段落里追加零散提醒
decisions.rationale: dogfood 暴露的是术语/协议边界不够显式，应该让 fresh agent 在 skill 前部就能建立 stop-line、publish/release、overlap/check 的基本模型。

decisions.chose: 把 mainline publish 定义为 intent metadata / actor-log publish，并明确不是产品 release/deploy/中文发布
decisions.rationale: Mainline metadata publish、Git push、PR、merge、release 是不同生命周期动作；混用会让 agent 越过用户真实授权边界。

decisions.point: overlap 到 check 的升级条件
decisions.chose: 只有 inspection 后判断为 real and potentially contradictory 的 overlap 才运行 mainline check；相邻/互补 overlap 记录判断即可
decisions.rationale: file overlap 是信号不是冲突。过早 check 会把普通协作重叠变成阻塞；静默忽略又会丢失团队可见判断。

decisions.chose: 把 mainline pr-description 生成的 marker body 作为 source of truth，并给出 gh pr create --body-file 正例
decisions.rationale: PR body marker 是下游 workflow 的识别协议，--fill 或 connector default body 会破坏 marker。

decisions.chose: README/reference 说明 global skill 与 AGENTS guidance 的更新路径分离，AGENTS/template 只给短 guardrail
decisions.rationale: AGENTS 是 repo-local runtime contract，global skill 是完整 workflow 手册；二者应互相指路但不互相假装已经刷新。

rejected.alternative: 把 dogfood 建议逐句塞回原段落
rejected.reason: 这会继续治标，不能解决 agent 第一眼建立错误术语模型的问题。

rejected.alternative: 把 overlap 都要求运行 mainline check
rejected.reason: 这会把相邻/互补协作也升级成冲突流程，增加无意义阻塞。

review_notes: Focused verification: git diff --check; go run . agents check --json; go test ./internal/engine -run 'TestAgents' -count=1.
已从当前 commit 6c3ddf0 运行 mainline update-real --no-pull，并用 npx --yes skills add ./skills/mainline --skill mainline --agent codex claude-code cursor --global --yes 重装全局 skill。

preflight 仍因同一 guidance 表面的 proposed/merged overlap 返回 block；本次 seal 记录了分类：int_1b0ff97a/int_f4781387 是同分支递进修复，int_7e059249 是 PR marker 协议保留强化，int_2653a0c2/int_4c8fab3d 是 schema/template guard 互补上游，int_9b78be92 是 repo guidance audit，均非语义互斥。

architectural_claims: Mainline publish is metadata publish, distinct from Git push, PR creation, PR merge, and product release/deploy.
File overlap is a signal; only inspected real and potentially contradictory overlap enters mainline check.
PR body source of truth for sealed intents is mainline pr-description output with the mainline:pr-description marker.
AGENTS guidance and global skill installs are separate distribution surfaces with separate refresh commands.
behavioral_changes: Agents see Chinese stop-line trigger phrases in the skill frontmatter and quick matrix.
Agents get a first-pass stop-line matrix before the longer workflow text.
Agents are told not to treat mainline publish as product release/deploy/发布.
Agents are told to classify overlaps and only run check for real and potentially contradictory conflicts.
Agents get gh pr create --body-file .ml-cache/pr-description.md as the safe fallback and are told not to use --fill/default PR bodies for sealed intents.
README/reference now state review autonomy does not authorize push main, merge, release, or deploy.
security_implications: Reduces risk of agents accidentally pushing main, merging, releasing, deploying, or using a PR body that drops the Mainline marker.
migration_notes: AGENTS managed template version bumped to 25 and stub version to 14; run mainline agents update to refresh repo guidance.
Existing global Mainline skill installs still require npx --yes skills update mainline --global --yes or the matching skills add command.
